privacyPolicy.content:
RECO PRIVACY POLICY
Last updated: July 15, 2025

1. Data Controller
Legal Name: Reco - Trusted Professionals
Fiscal Address: Residenciales San Jose, San José Pinula, Guatemala.
Email: privacy@recolatam.com

2. Data We Collect
 a) Data provided by you:
- Registration: Full name, email, phone, profile photo.
- Professionals: Experience, skills, licenses (optional), prices.
- Content: Project photos, reviews, messages.

 b) Data collected automatically:
- GPS Location: Only when the app is in use (can be disabled)
- Device: Model, OS, IP address.
- Usage: Screen time, searches, clicks.

 c) Third-party data:
- If you log in with Facebook/Google: Name and email.

3. Purposes of Processing
We use your data to:
✅ Connect users with professionals
✅ Personalize recommendations (using location)
✅ Verify identities (profile photo)
✅ Improve our platform (usage analytics)
📢 Send relevant offers (you may opt out)

4. Legal Bases (Law 57-2008)
- Contract execution: To provide the service
- Explicit consent: For location and marketing
- Legitimate interest: Analysis of anonymized data

5. Data Sharing
Your data may be shared with:
- Professionals: Only when hiring a service (they will see your name and approximate location)
- Technical providers: Hosting on AWS/Google Cloud (with GDPR contracts)
- Authorities: Upon legal request in Guatemala

6. Data Security
We implement:
- SSL/TLS encryption in communications
- Restricted access with two-factor authentication
- Daily backups

7. ARCO Rights
You may:
- Access your stored data
- Rectify incorrect information
- Cancel your account and delete data
- Object to processing for commercial purposes
To exercise these rights: Send a request to privacy@reco.com (we respond within 10 business days)

8. Data Retention
- Active accounts: Until deletion is requested
- Inactive accounts: 2 years (then anonymized)
- Transaction data: 5 years (for tax obligations)

9. Minors
⚠️ Registration by minors under 18 is prohibited. If we detect a minor's account, it will be immediately deleted.

10. Changes to this Policy
We will notify changes via:
- Email to registered users
- Highlighted banner in the app for 7 days

11. Contact
For privacy questions:
privacy@recolatam.com
Office: Residenciales San Jose, San José Pinula, Guatemala.

terms.content:
Last updated: July 15, 2025

1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing or using Reco (web platform or mobile app), you agree to these Terms and Conditions, our Privacy Policy, and all applicable policies. If you do not agree, please refrain from using our services.
To use Reco, you must be over 18 years old and have legal capacity to contract in Guatemala.

2. Definitions
"User": Anyone seeking professional services.
"Professional": Anyone offering services through Reco.
"Platform": Reco's website, mobile app, and associated services.

3. Reco Services
Reco acts as a technological intermediary to connect Users with Professionals. We are not employers nor responsible for the quality, safety, or legality of services provided by Professionals.

4. Registration and Accounts
You must provide truthful and updated information.
You are responsible for the confidentiality of your account and all activities under it.
Reco reserves the right to suspend accounts for false information or inappropriate conduct.

5. Mobile App Permissions
By using the app, you expressly authorize:
Location: To show nearby Professionals and improve recommendations (can be disabled in device settings).
Camera and Gallery: To upload project photos or verify Professional identity.
Notifications: To receive updates on bookings, messages, and promotions.
(These permissions are managed according to our Privacy Policy and can be revoked at any time).

6. Responsibilities of User and Professional
Users:
Evaluate the suitability of the Professional (by checking reviews, credentials, etc.).
Do not make payments outside the Platform (except post-service tips).
Professionals:
Comply with all local laws (taxes, licenses, insurance).
Ensure the accuracy of your profile, prices, and availability.
Prohibited for both:
Use for illegal purposes, fraud, or harassment.
Copy/unfair competition using Reco data.

7. Hiring and Payments
Current model: Free for basic connections.
Future models: Reco may implement payment systems, subscriptions, or advertising, notifying you 30 days in advance.
Disputes: Any conflict between User and Professional must be resolved between the parties. Reco may mediate at its discretion, with no legal obligation.

8. User-Generated Content
You grant Reco a non-exclusive license to use photos, reviews, and other content uploaded to the Platform.
Uploading defamatory, violent, or third-party infringing content is prohibited.

9. Limitation of Liability
Reco does not guarantee:
The availability, timeliness, or quality of Professionals' services.
The accuracy of profiles or reviews.
Damages arising from use of the Platform (e.g., technical failures, malware).
Reco's maximum liability will be the amount paid by you in the last 6 months.

10. Privacy and Data
The use of personal data (location, photos, contact) is governed by our Privacy Policy, in compliance with Guatemala's Personal Data Protection Law (Law 57-2008).

11. Intellectual Property
All rights to the Platform (software, logos, content) are owned by Reco or its licensors. Reproduction without authorization is prohibited.

12. Modifications and Termination
Reco may update these Terms by notifying you 15 days in advance. Continued use implies acceptance.
You may close your account at any time. Reco may suspend services for serious breaches.

13. Applicable Law and Dispute Resolution
These are governed by the laws of Guatemala.
Any dispute will be resolved through mandatory negotiation and, if it persists, in the courts of Guatemala City.

14. Contact
For legal questions: legal@recolatam.com
Physical address: Residenciales San Jose, San José Pinula, Guatemala.
